programmes.show_description: A family of 14 fall foul of the "Great British Weather" in Cornwall, while in Somerset there's a new star for the Summer Panto as a stage novice is given a chance to shine.
In Somerset, Simon indulges in a love of dogs by planning the park's version of Crufts. And in Cornwall, Tencreek Holiday Park gears up for a talent show featuring its guests.
Arthur learns about the secret operations that occurred in Hampshire during the war, including secret factories that helped assemble aircraft.

Jessica helps to solve the backstage murder of a young dancer when she attends a special presentation of the famous Rostov Ballet.
A flamboyant hypnotist is stabbed in the back behind locked and guarded doors in front of an audience of journalists he had placed in a trance.
Jessica Fletcher becomes embroiled in the political intrigue of Washington, DC when she takes over the seat left by a deceased congressman.
When Jessica investigates the attempted murders of a Broadway actress and her talented daughter, she soon finds her own life in danger.
In New Orleans, Jessica must solve the mysterious murder of a famous musician who was killed while performing.
Jessica investigates the death of her friend Diego Santana, a famous painter. But which of his friends and family had a killer's motive?
When Jessica is arrested for murder, secret agent Michael Haggerty and her nephew Grady conspire to keep her safely in jail while they seek the real killer.
A US senatorial hopeful is murdered and his wife's necklace stolen. Are the two crimes connected?

programmes.show_name: Fawlty Towers: A Very British Comedy
programmes.show_description: Exploring John Cleese and Connie Booth's iconic 70s sitcom, including deleted scenes and archival interviews, and unpicking its sometimes uncomfortable place in today's world.

programmes.show_name: Penelope Keith: From Margo to The Manor Born
programmes.show_description: We reveal the real Dame Penelope Keith, the actress best known for creating two of TV's greatest comedy characters - Margo Leadbetter and Audrey Fforbes-Hamilton.
Drama series. Liz's decision to testify against Sonia boomerangs in court. Franky asks Jianna's son to help prove her innocence. Kaz declares war on drugs.

programmes.show_name: Columbo: Sex and the Married Detective
programmes.show_description: Detective drama starring Peter Falk and Lindsay Crouse. Columbo gets some advice from a world-famous sex therapist when he investigates the murder of her former lover. (1989)

programmes.show_name: The Small Hand: A Ghost Story
programmes.show_description: Chilling adaptation of Susan Hill's The Small Hand, starring Dougie Henshall and Louise Lombard. An antique book dealer finds himself haunted by the ghost of a young boy. (2019)
The murder of 12-year-old Simon's father sets him on a terrifying journey. He is convinced the killing is linked to an isolated cottage in the woods - but no one believes him.
